mentions.note: Steel peer mentioned alongside Steel Dynamics as beneficiary of US strength and tariff support; Cramer likes the two of them together.
Best steel company in world; pre-announced strong earnings, up 12% since; buy on any Monday dip given Fed rate cuts and tariffs.
Cramer's favorite steel company vs. Cleveland Cliffs; superior operator under CEO Leon Topalian. Stock hit 52-week high heading into session; buyer on any weakness.
Mixed quarter but stock at 52-week high; protected by steel tariffs blocking foreign dumping; CEO Topalian credits very supportive pro-manufacturing trade environment.
Had great session today. Cramer sees straight shot to $200. Preferred over Commercial Metals. Wishes he'd recommended for travel trust; may add.
Tremendous steelmaker and best industrial; hope for pullback entry but stock rarely corrects significantly.
Record demand, 42-cent EPS beat, 21% revenue growth YoY; tariff-protected level playing field + $20B capex investment driving unprecedented backlog. Still undervalued.
Largest U.S. steel company; benefits from Quanta and other infrastructure buildout for data center grid expansion.
Steel supplier; critical material for data center construction and framework.
Nice bump on rotation into rotting insurers; seems attractive as consolidation cycle develops; Cramer hasn't recommended in 22 years, but sentiment now positive.
